Splash, the youth-oriented comedy about a mermaid in Manhattan,

Another surprise, the resignation of Roy E. Disney as chairman of the board.

Even second string, you were hungry to be part of this, to jump into the game.

and we needed to get out into the whole town.

In almost every musical ever written,

And the leading lady usually sits down on something,
sometimes it's a tree stump in Brigadoon,
sometimes it's under the pillars of Covent Garden in My Fair Lady,

But the leading lady sits down on something

Frank, of all of us, was the most selfless,

Interesting thing about Frank, he carried in his wallet
